purpose: A second tracker file in the same repo demonstrating that federated_trackers actually federate. The directory page fetches this URL alongside index.json and merges the entries (deduped by neighborhood_rappid). Anyone running their own tracker exposes their index at any URL; trackers reference each other to compose a multi-tracker view of the metropolis. No central authority.

entries.name: rapp-zoo-federated-mirror
entries._federation_note: This entry is unique to this tracker; the canonical index at index.json does not list it. When the directory page merges, this row materializes only in the federated view.

entries.name: constitution-readers-circle
entries._federation_note: Demo entry that lives ONLY in this peer tracker. Proves the federation primitive surfaces non-canonical entries via the merge.

protocol.merge_rule: Entries are deduped by neighborhood_rappid; canonical index entries take precedence on conflict; unique-to-peer entries are added with a `from_tracker` annotation in the merged view.
protocol.self_reference_safe: A tracker can list itself in federated_trackers without infinite recursion — the directory page tracks fetched URLs and skips duplicates.
